description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 6th; Slot none; Price 1,200 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This dark, syrupy draught doubles the range of the drinker’s darkvision and also enables her to see through deeper darkness when using darkvision. The effects last for 1 hour. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, darkvision, deeper darkness; Cost 600 gp
